titleStmt.title: SII 29.91: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 91. (A.R. No. B. 153 of 1962-63.) GAḌIGARĒVULA, NANDYAL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in front of the main shrine of the Bhōgēśvarasvāmin temple.
This damaged and broken record belongs to the reign period of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva. The king is stated to have been ruling from the capital Kalyāṇa.

It seems to register some grants for worship, offerings and perpetual lamp for a deity [name lost] probably by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gōvaṇachōḷa-mahārāja who was governing Heḍakal-800 [same as Pedekal-800] division. The chief bears the usual praśasti of Telugu-Chōḍas and is described as the lord of Noṟeyūrpura.
The slab containing details of grant and date is broken and lost. The record is in characters of 11th-12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīma
tribhuvanamalladēva vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇada nelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samadhigata
paṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Anēka
ripudurddharaṁ narabhujāsi bhāsura pracaṁḍa
pradyōta dinakara kuḷanaṁdana kāsyapa gō
tra kallikālānvayaṁ kāvērīvallabhaṁ
balla ṟeghōśaṇaṁ mayūra
siṁhalāṁchana noṟeyūrppu
ravarēśvaraṁ paṁcakraramaḷama
maṇi śara ṇāgata rakṣāmaṇi
nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara gōvaṇacōḷa ma
heḍakalleṁṭu nūṟa
dūrvasi
dīvige gaṁ dhūpakkaṁ nitya
ya pūje
manādiya gaḍi The rest
Digital edition of SII 29.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
